_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox late-inning bullpen owns MLB's best ERA, batting average against since Opening Day
items.snark: Slaten, Whitlock, Chapman are 19-for-19 holding leads after seven, shame the offense can't get them one.

items.headline: Red Sox 7, Royals 1: Duran three-run bomb caps four-run ninth inning blowout
items.snark: Sox got more free gifts than a bar mitzvah and still almost blew it before Duran remembered he can hit.

items.headline: Contreras went 2-for-5 with three RBI in win over Royals Tuesday night
items.snark: Willson Contreras doing the entire lineup's job one swing at a time, classic 2026 Sox baseball.

items.headline: Marcelo Mayer lobbying for shortstop time with Story out, Tracy weighing options
items.snark: Mayer wants to play short, Tracy's weighing it like he's deciding which Titanic deck chair to rearrange.

items.headline: Trevor Story placed on IL with sports hernia, surgery a possibility for 6-10 weeks
items.snark: Trevor Story's body breaking down faster than the Sox playoff odds, six errors and a .547 OPS wasn't enough?

items.headline: This part of the plan has worked: Gray and Contreras steals paying off for Breslow
items.snark: Craig Breslow actually nailed two trades, somebody check the temperature in hell.
